repo_root.description: Absolute path to the repository the run works in.

base_branch.description: Branch the workspace branches from and the handoff diffs against.

gate_commands.description: Commands that must exit zero for a round to count as green.

max_fix_cycles.description: Ceiling on fix rounds before the run reports itself exhausted.

lenses.description: Adversarial review lenses; one review runs per lens.
